title: Mods Fabric for building massive proyects
description: a modpack that helps you with chest organizing , building large proyects and that have some cool improvements to some vanilla features aswell as some QOL mods
body:
A modpack with all you need to have a good chest organization , building large proyects, inventory organization , and some qol mods .
My modpack aims to better the organization of storage , and aid to the building of big proyects using mods like litematica and world edit , i aim to aswell aid with some issues vanilla has , like optimization , or when an account disconects from the minecraft server , removing the need to relaunch the game, aswell as being able to host your own world without the need of an external server
